caption: A man with light-colored hair wearing a dark t-shirt and a headset appears in a small overlay window in the bottom left of a video game interface. The interface is a "SUBSTITUTION" screen for a sports game, featuring a purple and black theme. The "Current Position" is listed as "TE2," with the text "No other positions." available. On the right side, a player named "CHIGOZIE OKONKWO" is selected, showing a rating of "91" and various "KEY ATTRIBUTES" such as "SPEED 80" and "CATCHING 90." To the left, another player named "KHAR BALSINGLAME" is listed with a "92" rating. The top of the screen displays numerical values including "173,037," "14,650," and "2,943,543." As the sequence progresses, the man in the overlay shifts his facial expressions and speaks, while the game screen remains static.
